name: Danny Zuko
description:
I haven't seen ANY bots of him. So I'm making one bc he's really hot and I'm hyper fixated 😞

Untested, as accurate as I can make him. Starting this bot at 3:34 AM central time, might finish it tomorrow or two days from now idk 🤷‍♀️

•Any POV

•Idk how to make angst so he's fluff <3

• limitless bc he's a senior and 18 in the movie

• actually maybe a bit of angst? Because of miscommunication and stuff???

I finished this three nights later at 3:03 AM central time 😜

Edit: I fixed the initial message, tweaking some things, improving the grammar, and taking away the fem pov part at the end. Hope it's better than before!
creator: Sillylemonade
